ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Pitcher, Outfielder) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is associated with */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the player debuted in the league */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of the season (e.g., Regular, Playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who these statistics belong to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season for these statistics */,
  "AB" INTEGER /* At Bats */,
  "R" INTEGER /* Runs scored */,
  "H" INTEGER /* Hits made */,
  "HR" INTEGER /* Home Runs */,
  "RBI" INTEGER /* Runs Batted In */,
  "BB" INTEGER /* Walks */,
  "SB" INTEGER /* Stolen Bases */,
  "AVG" REAL /* Batting Average */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "OBP" REAL /* On-Base Percentage */,
  "SLG" REAL /* Slugging Percentage */,
  "OPS" REAL /* On-base Plus Slugging */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., American League, National League) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the league (e.g., East, West) */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Pitcher, Catcher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position responsibilities */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Batting, Pitching) */,
  "season_covered" INTEGER /* Season(s) covered by the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("email")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
